SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSENBLEDT, DAN SERVED DEC-30-1995, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, FRANCISCO ELIZONDO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSENBLEDT, DAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, FRANCISCO ELIZONDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3358 ARMY ST, LEASE FORFEITED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSENBLEDT, DAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, FRANCISCO ELIZONDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 1/3/96 $2,000.00 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,080.00, LEASE FORFEITED
